problem_statement: A focused test passes from the checkout but the corresponding worker still exhibits the pre-fix behavior. Diagnose before editing the implementation again.

observations.statement: The checked-out source and focused test both contain the fix at revision r9, and the test passes when imported from that checkout.
The running worker image label reports revision r7 and its loaded module hash matches the pre-fix file rather than the checkout.
Recreating only an isolated worker from revision r9 makes the behavior match the focused test without any additional source edit.
